job_title: Senior Card and Pin Personalization Officer
job_objective: To ensure effective flow of the daily activities of Card Issuance and PIN production processes are runs as per the procedure of Card Banking. II. Key Job Duties and Responsibilities: The job holders responsibilities include, but are not limited to: Organize the routine activities and involve in the Card production team; Ensure the production of Cards and PINs with Standard Service Delivery Time; Ensure all email conversations are handled on time and properly; Keeping track of lessons learned and shares those lessons with team members; Ensure and follows the sufficient stocks of Blank Card, PINs and Stationary materials are maintained; Receive authorized letters of request from CBEs He ad Office Organs /Districts/Branches for the issuance of Platinum and Gold level cards whose account balances are below the minimum requirement or for other debit cards that could not be processed through the core banking system; Receive authorized letters or emails of request from Branches for urgent issuance of cards that can be processed manually on the card banking system and forward them to Banking operation officer; Receive authorized letters of request for issuance of PINs from Branches or other organs of the Bank as appropriate and ensure the genuineness of the requests; Receive rejected cards from the Associate card and PIN personalization officer I and reconcile the number of rejected cards with the total number of blank cards held in stock; Destroy the rejected cards monthly together with the Card and PIN personalization officer and the Internal Control Officer; Ensure that both personalized and blank cards are kept safely; Commercial Bank of Ethiopia Job Description Performs other duties as assigned. IV Key Performance Indicators: Strategic and operational efficiency and effectiveness such as: Efficient use of resource; Timely response to requests from Branches/Districts/HO Organs; Team collaboration; Customer Satisfaction. V Summary of Key Competency, Educational and Professional Requirements: 1. Summary of Key Competency Requirements 1.1 Leadership Competency at Proficiency of Level Novice (One) Deals with Conflict Drives for Result Emotional Intelligence Learning Agility Manages performance Operates from a strategic perspective Organizational awareness & diplomacy Manages Relationships 1.2 Organizational Values Competency at Proficiency Level of Intermediate (Two) Corporate Citizenship Respect for Diversity Teamwork Innovative Organization Empowerment Professionalism Service Excellence Integrity. 2. Educational and Professional Requirements Masters Degree in Economics or Management or Accounting or other Business related fields or B.A Degree in Economics or Management or Accounting or other Business related fields with 6/8 years of Banking experience respectively of which 2 years at Job Grade 12. Commercial Bank of Ethiopia Job Description 1.3 Technical Competency VI.
